titleStmt.title: SII 40.59: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 59. (A.R. No. B. 38 of 1930.) Rāmāpuram, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up by the side of the tank in the village.
This is dated Khara, Margaśira śu. 10.
States that provision was made for the upkeep of the tank dug by a certain Guruvā-Reḍḍi and his wife Nāramma by their sons Veṅkaṭa-Reḍḍi and Kichchā Reḍḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī sadguru parabraṁhmaṇē namaḥ .
śubhamastu
khara nāma saṁ . mā¨rgaśira śu 10 lu Ācaṁdrā
rkastāyigā vrāyabaḍni śāsanamu
śrīharidāsuḍayni Ākūri guruvāreḍḍi
gāru vāri bhārya nāraṁmmagāruṁnnū vu
bhayulu manaḥ sustiramuga yōciṁcci vēśi
yiṁcabaḍni śrīrāmāpuramuku paḍamara
puna taṭākaṁbu yiṁtaku pūrvaṁ
vēyiṁci vuṁnnāru . vāri komārula
yniveṁkaṭareḍḍi . kiccāreḍḍi . vīri bhāryalucnināraṁ
mma . pedaśēṣaṁmma yī naluguru vāri pūrva
stānamayni cervūnnūkālvayaṁnnūka
ttapayuṁnnū . yiṁdduku Ādhāramaina
pedda kattavunu vivariṁci maraṁmmatu cēyiṁcutūrā
gā yivvayaka pedaśēṣaṁmmagāru manivuṁḍi tagu
stānamula maraṁmmatu lābhamulu lēkuṁ
ḍā jarigiṁcumani tnabhāva kumārulakuṁnnu
tana kumāruḍikiṁnninnu pūrvulu vēyiṁ
cabaḍina dharmacervulanu pālana cēyyama
nitna bāvagāru ceppina prakāraṁ śelavu
yiccinadi . tārakhaṁnadaru .
Engraved on the right side of the inscription.

veṁkaṭareḍḍi koḍukulu liṁgāreḍi guruvāreḍḍi vārapureḍḍi .
demiremuśilagāḍu yī Aṁnnagāḍu śrīmagāḍu yī kōṭaḍuṭū naluguru veṁkaṭareḍḍi ceppina prakāraṁ cervu pani cēsināru . liṁgāreḍḍi vagairālu ceppina prakāraṁ yiccaṭa ḍabbiṁcavāru Ubhayulu ceppina cestuvunnāru .
Digital edition of SII 40.59 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
